# MixMind AI

## Project

MixMind AI is an AI-powered multimedia platform designed to analyze audio tracks and assist DJs by extracting musical features and estimating compatibility between songs.

The project is being developed as the practical implementation of the course **DCC082 – Sistemas Multimídia (UFJF)**.

The objective is to build production-quality software while demonstrating multimedia processing techniques.

---

# Current Features

Implemented:

- FastAPI backend
- Audio upload
- Audio storage
- Librosa audio analysis
- BPM extraction
- RMS Energy extraction
- Sample Rate extraction
- Duration extraction
- Compatibility Engine
- Automated tests
- CI/CD
- Pre-commit
- Ruff
- Black
- isort

Next features:

- Waveform Generation
- Spectrogram Generation
- Dashboard API
- FFmpeg Pipeline
- Musical Feature Extraction
- Key Detection
- Recommendation Engine
- Frontend Dashboard

---

# Tech Stack

Backend

- Python
- FastAPI
- Pydantic
- Librosa
- NumPy
- SciPy

Frontend

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS

Testing

- pytest

Quality

- Ruff
- Black
- isort
- pre-commit

CI

- GitHub Actions
